title: lotus hispidus var. subbiflorus
intro: Lotus hispidus var. subbiflorus, also known as the Lotus hispidus or Fragrant Lotus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Nelumbo genus in the family Nymphaeaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Lotus hispidus var. subbiflorus include potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects, as well as the ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional Asian medicine for its purported medicinal properties.
